SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionMethodReturnValue
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement implements IExecutionMethodReturnValue
An implementation of IExecutionMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

      Checks if a condition is available via IExecutionMethodReturnValue.getCondition() under which this return value is returned.

      Returns:
      true condition is available, false condition is not available.
